output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? How to Demand It Back Fast (Legally)
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No signup needed.
content_outline: The Security Deposit Problem: Why Landlords Wrongfully Withhold
What Your Landlord Can (and Cannot) Legally Deduct
State-by-State Timeline: How Long They Have to Return It
DIY Demand Letter vs. Lawyer: The $19.99 Solution
Step-by-Step: How to Send Your Letter in 60 Seconds
key_points: Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14–30 days and provide an itemized deduction list
Normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, and vague 'repair' charges are generally not legally deductible
A formal demand letter is often the fastest way to force compliance before escalating to small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific, legally compliant demand letters instantly for $19.99 with no signup or subscription
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Generate your legally compliant security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds — just $19.99, no signup, no subscription.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposits
